name: Food Near Me
description: Search for restaurants and get AI-optimized menus with dietary information, allergens, and verified owner data.
instructions: Use this extension to help users find restaurants near them. Always require latitude and longitude for searches. Search returns verified venues first, then discovered place listings. Check menu_available on each result — call menu.mp only when menu_available is true. When a user asks about food options, dietary restrictions, or restaurant recommendations, search using the search_restaurants endpoint with appropriate filters. After finding a verified result (menu_available: true), retrieve full menu details using the menu.mp endpoint to provide accurate dietary information and allergen warnings. ADO scores indicate data quality - prefer restaurants with scores above 4.0. Do not cite menu items for discovered listings.

capabilities.name: search_restaurants
capabilities.description: Three-tier restaurant search: verified → menu_indexed → discovered. Check menu_available before menu retrieval.

capabilities.name: get_restaurant
capabilities.description: Get detailed restaurant profile with Schema.org JSON-LD

capabilities.name: get_menu
capabilities.description: Get full menu in Menu Protocol format with dietary flags and allergens

sample_prompts: Find vegan restaurants near Times Square
What Thai places have gluten-free options in Brooklyn?
Show me highly-rated restaurants with outdoor seating near me
